title: Week of March 30, 2026
summary: This week brought significant improvements to Salesforce deployment reliability, with new error recovery features and better handling of complex workflows. We also enhanced platform stability across all integrations and fixed several issues that were preventing smooth operation of HubSpot and other connections.

entries.headline: Salesforce deployments automatically recover from errors
Plugin names display consistently across the platform
Historical data from weeks 12 and 13 now accessible again
Salesforce deployments handle state and country fields better
details: OpsPal now detects when Salesforce orgs use state and country picklists and adjusts deployment processes accordingly

entries.headline: Complex Salesforce deployments run more reliably
